overview.tagline: A small, resilient borough in the Meadowlands with a tight-knit community spirit
overview.description: Moonachie is a compact borough of less than one square mile in the southeastern Meadowlands region of Bergen County. With a population under 3,000, it is one of the smallest municipalities in the county. Despite its size, Moonachie has a strong community identity forged in part by shared challenges, including severe flooding during Hurricane Sandy in 2012. The borough is situated near Teterboro Airport and has convenient access to major highways, making it a practical location for residents who work in the area or commute to New York City.
overview.schoolDistrict: Moonachie Public Schools / South Bergen Jointure Commission
highlights: Close-knit community with active civic organizations
Proximity to Teterboro Airport and MetLife Stadium area
Convenient access to Routes 17, 46, and NJ Turnpike
Affordable housing compared to much of Bergen County
Strong community resilience demonstrated after Hurricane Sandy

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties are assessed by the Borough Tax Assessor. The low elevation and Meadowlands location can affect flood insurance requirements and property valuations.
realEstate.recentTrends: Moonachie's housing market offers some of the most affordable options in Bergen County. Post-Sandy recovery led to significant home improvements and elevated construction. The market has seen moderate appreciation. Flood insurance costs are an important factor for buyers.
neighborhoodNotes: Moonachie Avenue area — Main residential corridor with a mix of housing types
Joseph Street/Carol Place — Quieter residential streets
Industrial area — Commercial and warehouse properties along Redneck Avenue
Northern section — Closer to Little Ferry border with newer construction

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup is provided by a contracted hauler for the Borough of Moonachie.
details: Trash collection occurs twice per week
Place containers curbside by 6:00 AM on collection day
Use approved containers with secure lids
Bulk item pickup available by arrangement with the DPW
Holiday schedule posted on the borough website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Recycling is collected on a regular schedule by the Borough's contracted hauler.
details: Commingled recyclables collected biweekly
Paper and cardboard on alternate weeks
Recycling bins available from the Borough
Yard waste collected seasonally
Special collection events held periodically

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water and sewer services are provided through local utilities and the Bergen County Utilities Authority.
details: Water provided by Veolia Water (formerly United Water)
Sewer service through the Bergen County Utilities Authority (BCUA)
Billing handled by the respective utility providers
Water quality reports available annually
Emergency water line repairs available 24/7 through Veolia

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles permits, inspections, and code enforcement.
details: Permits required for construction, renovation, and home improvements
Flood zone compliance required for construction projects
Applications available at Borough Hall
Inspections coordinated through the Building Department
Elevated construction standards in flood-prone areas

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Street parking and municipal lot regulations are enforced by the borough.
details: On-street parking subject to posted restrictions
Overnight parking restrictions enforced
Snow emergency parking rules in effect during storms
Municipal lot available near Borough Hall
Parking violations subject to fines

additionalServices.title: Moonachie Free Public Library
additionalServices.description: Small community library serving borough residents.
details: Located at 100 Moonachie Avenue
Children's programs and adult book clubs
Free Wi-Fi and computer access
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Moonachie enforces noise standards to maintain peace in this compact residential community.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 8:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction allowed 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction on Sundays or holidays
Loud music and parties subject to noise limits after 10:00 PM
Commercial operations must comply with noise standards

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Property owners must maintain their properties to borough standards, with particular attention to flood mitigation.
keyRules: Lawns and yards must be maintained and kept clean
Properties must be free from junk, debris, and standing water
Structures must be maintained in good condition
Snow must be cleared from sidewalks within 24 hours
Flood mitigation improvements are encouraged

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Pets must be licensed and controlled per borough ordinance.
keyRules: All dogs must be licensed annually
Dogs must be leashed when off the owner's property
Pet waste must be picked up immediately
Barking dogs subject to noise complaints
Dangerous dog provisions apply per state law

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Parking rules are enforced to manage space in this compact borough.
keyRules: No overnight parking on streets from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM without permit
Vehicles must be moved during snow emergencies
No parking in fire zones or within 25 feet of intersections
Commercial vehicles restricted from residential streets overnight
Violations subject to ticketing and towing

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must be registered and maintained per borough requirements.
keyRules: Rental properties must be registered with the Borough
Habitability inspections required before new tenants move in
Landlords responsible for code-compliant maintenance
Short-term rentals subject to zoning regulations
Fire safety standards must be met for all rental units

other.title: Flood Zone Regulations
other.summary: Due to its Meadowlands location, Moonachie has specific flood zone construction and elevation requirements.
keyRules: New construction in flood zones must meet FEMA elevation requirements
Substantial improvements to existing structures may trigger elevation requirements
Flood insurance is required for properties in Special Flood Hazard Areas
Borough participates in the National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP)
other.source: Borough of Moonachie Flood Damage Prevention Ordinance

publicSchools.name: Robert L. Craig School
publicSchools.notes: The borough's sole public school; students in grades 7-12 attend Wood-Ridge schools through a sending-receiving relationship

whyMoveHere: Most affordable housing in Bergen County
Tight-knit community with active civic life
Proximity to major highways and Teterboro Airport
Close to Meadowlands entertainment and sports complex
Small-town feel within minutes of New York City

commuteToNYC.notes: Moonachie is well-positioned for commuting via NJ Transit bus service to the Port Authority. Residents also use nearby Route 17 and the NJ Turnpike for driving commutes. The Lincoln Tunnel and George Washington Bridge are both accessible within 20 minutes.

costOfLiving.summary: Moonachie is one of the most affordable communities in Bergen County, with lower home prices and property taxes than most neighboring towns.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: At or slightly below the New Jersey average for housing costs
costOfLiving.vsNationalAverage: Somewhat above the national average, primarily due to property taxes

pros: Very affordable by Bergen County standards
Strong community spirit and neighbor-to-neighbor support
Close to Meadowlands entertainment (MetLife Stadium, American Dream)
Compact borough where everything is within walking distance
cons: Flood risk due to low elevation in the Meadowlands
Flood insurance can add significant costs for homeowners
Limited local shopping and dining options
Aircraft noise from nearby Teterboro Airport
Small school district with limited course offerings at upper grades

restaurants.name: Moonachie Diner
restaurants.description: Classic New Jersey diner serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner with a full menu of American favorites.

restaurants.name: Il Villaggio
restaurants.description: Italian restaurant offering traditional pasta dishes, pizza, and seafood in a family setting.

restaurants.name: Redd's Restaurant & Bar
restaurants.description: Local bar and grill popular with residents for casual dining and drinks.

parks.name: Joseph P. Tynan Memorial Park
parks.description: Borough park with playground, sports fields, and a memorial to local veterans.

parks.name: Moonachie Recreation Area
parks.description: Open space with ball fields and recreational facilities for residents.

parks.name: Meadowlands Environment Center (nearby)
parks.description: Environmental education center and nature trails in the Meadowlands, just minutes from Moonachie.

events.name: Moonachie Day
events.description: Annual borough celebration with food vendors, games, live music, and community activities.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Community tree lighting ceremony with refreshments and festive activities.

attractions.name: Teterboro Airport
attractions.description: General aviation airport adjacent to Moonachie, one of the busiest in the New York metro area.

attractions.name: American Dream Mall (nearby)
attractions.description: Massive entertainment and retail complex in the Meadowlands featuring a water park, amusement park, and shopping.
attractions.address: 1 American Dream Way, East Rutherford, NJ

attractions.name: MetLife Stadium (nearby)
attractions.description: Home of the NFL's Giants and Jets, located in the Meadowlands Sports Complex minutes from Moonachie.
attractions.address: 1 MetLife Stadium Drive, East Rutherford, NJ

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the second and fourth Thursday of each month at 7:00 PM
